import sys

def main():
    text = sys.argv[1]
    n = int(sys.argv[2])
    lines = text.split('\n')
    last_n_lines = '\n'.join(lines[-n:]) + '\n'
    print(last_n_lines)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

python_local.code:
import sys

def filter_filenames(filenames, extension):
    return '\n'.join([filename for filename in filenames.split('\n') if filename.endswith('.' + extension)]) + '\n'

if __name__ == "__main__":
    input_data = sys.argv[1]
    target_extension = sys.argv[2]
    result = filter_filenames(input_data, target_extension)
    print(result)

python_local.code:
import sys

def filter_csv_rows(csv_string, column_index, threshold):
    rows = csv_string.strip().split('\n')
    filtered_rows = [row for row in rows if int(row.split(',')[int(column_index)]) > int(threshold)]
    return '\n'.join(filtered_rows)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    csv_input = sys.argv[1]
    column_index = sys.argv[2]
    threshold = sys.argv[3]
    result = filter_csv_rows(csv_input, column_index, threshold)
    print(result)

import sys

if len(sys.argv) != 3:
    print("Usage: python script.py <text> <substring>")
    sys.exit(1)

text = sys.argv[1]
substring = sys.argv[2]

lines = text.split('\n')
filtered_lines = [line for line in lines if substring not in line]
output = '\n'.join(filtered_lines) + '\n'

print(output)

import sys

lines = sys.argv[1].split('\n')
seen = set()
result = []

for line in lines:
    if line not in seen:
        result.append(line)
        seen.add(line)

print('\n'.join(result))

      (set i (add i 1)))
    (println (fmt "{:.2f} {}" val (array_get units i)))))

python_local.code:
import sys

def filter_lines(lines, pattern):
    return [line for line in lines if pattern in line and 'grep' not in line]

if __name__ == "__main__":
    input_data = sys.argv[1]
    pattern = sys.argv[2]
    lines = input_data.split('\n')
    filtered_lines = filter_lines(lines, pattern)
    print('\n'.join(filtered_lines))

python_local.code:
import sys

input_data = sys.argv[1]
lines = input_data.split('\n')
output = ''

for line in lines:
    if line:
        parts = line.split(' ', 2)
        if len(parts) > 2:
            author = parts[1]
            message = ' '.join(parts[2:])
            output += f'{author}: {message}\n'

print(output.strip())

python_local.code:
import sys

text = sys.argv[1]
lines = text.split('\n')
result = []

i = 0
while i < len(lines):
    count = 1
    while i + 1 < len(lines) and lines[i] == lines[i + 1]:
        i += 1
        count += 1
    result.append(f'{count:4} {lines[i]}')
    i += 1

print('\n'.join(result))

sigil.code:
(set perm string $0)

(fn oct_digit_to_bits d int -> int
  (set bits int 0)
  (if (ge d 4) (set bits (add bits 4)))
  (if (ge d 2) (set bits (add bits 2)))
  (if (ge d 1) (set bits (add bits 1)))
  (ret bits))

(set r int (oct_digit_to_bits (string_get perm 0)))
(set w int (oct_digit_to_bits (string_get perm 1)))
(set x int (oct_digit_to_bits (string_get perm 2)))

(fn bit_to_char b int -> string
  (if (eq b 7) (ret "rwx"))
  (if (eq b 6) (ret "rw-"))
  (if (eq b 5) (ret "r-x"))
  (if (eq b 4) (ret "r--"))
  (if (eq b 3) (ret "-wx"))
  (if (eq b 2) (ret "-w-"))
  (if (eq b 1) (ret "--x"))
  (if (eq b 0) (ret "---"))
  (ret ""))

(set r_str string (bit_to_char r))
(set w_str string (bit_to_char w))
(set x_str string (bit_to_char x))

(println (string_concat (string_concat (string_concat r_str w_str) x_str) "\n"))

(set parts array (split $0 "."))
(if (ne (len parts) 4)
  (println "no")
  (else
    (set ok true)
    (for-each p string parts
      (if (eq (len p) 0)
        (set ok false))
      (if ok
        (set n int (len p))
        (if (and (gt n 1) (eq (string_get p 0) 48))
          (set ok false))))
    (if ok
      (for-each p string parts
        (set alldig true)
        (for i 0 n
          (if (not (is_digit (string_get p i)))
            (set alldig false)))
        (if (not alldig)
          (set ok false))
        (if ok
          (if (gt (int p) 255)
            (set ok false)))))
    (if ok (println "yes") (else (println "no")))))

(set args array (split $0 " "))
(set counts map {})
(for-each arg string args
  (if (not (in arg counts))
    (set counts (map_set counts arg 0)))
  (set counts (map_set counts arg (add (map_get counts arg) 1))))
(println (join (sort (map_keys counts)) " "))

python_local.code:
import sys

source_code = sys.argv[1]
lines = source_code.split('\n')
function_names = []

for line in lines:
    if line.strip().startswith('def ') and '(' in line:
        function_name = line.split('(')[0].split(' ')[1]
        function_names.append(function_name)

print('\n'.join(function_names))
